scripts.lint: npm run lint:apex ; npm run lint:doc
scripts.prepush: npm run test && npm run lint
scripts.test: sf apex run test --result-format human --output-dir ./tests/apex --test-level RunLocalTests --synchronous

build:incremental.command: sf project deploy start -d $(git --no-pager diff --name-only --diff-filter=AM --merge-base main force-app | grep '.cls$' | xargs -I{} dirname {} | awk 'NR==1{common=$0;next} {while(index(common"/",$0)==0) common=substr(common, 1, length(common)-1)} END{print common}')

test:incremental.command: sf apex run test --code-coverage --detailed-coverage --result-format human --output-dir ./tests/apex  --synchronous --tests MethodSpyOnceTest
